$comments: BH-3: Renovate covers the surface Dependabot can't:
- Helm chart versions referenced in ArgoCD ApplicationSets
- Docker base-image digest pinning (Dependabot updates tags but
Dependabot continues to handle pip / npm / terraform / github-actions
Note: needs the Renovate GitHub App installed on the repo. Without
the app this config is inert.

packageRules.$description: Group platform-chart bumps so they review together.
Base-image bumps: tag + digest together, one PR per Dockerfile.
Pin digests automatically for any newly-added FROM/COPY-from base image.
Bitnami keycloak image digest in values.yaml — match by custom datasource since helm-values doesn't auto-detect it.
Hold majors for hand-review — they tend to require chart-values migrations.
Vendored CRDs (prometheus-operator + cnpg) — auto-regen recipe lives in each crds.yaml header; Renovate handles the version bumps that drive that.
packageRules.$comment: Disabled: Renovate can't manage the regen pipeline for these vendored bundles. Bump cnpg / kube-prometheus-stack chart first, then run the regen recipe documented in each crds.yaml.

customManagers.$description: Track the bitnamilegacy/keycloak image digest pinned in values.yaml so Renovate keeps it aligned when the upstream tag content changes.
